extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT George attacked in final kilometer with Aru and Majka, sat up after gapping them to take stage win while Landa secured crucial time bonuses
tactical_patterns: Aru counterattacked immediately after Froome paced Thomas back from mechanical, exploiting precise moment rival team exhausted domestique
Bennett tactically surrendered stage win to secure victory margin after establishing gap, prioritizing certainty over 10-second bonus
Landa sprinted hard for bonus seconds despite losing stage, revealing GC calculation prioritized over stage hunting when gaps small

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: mechanical at worst possible moment during Landa GC attack forced Froome sacrifice, lost race lead despite recovery
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: delivered exceptional chase ride to return Thomas to contention after mechanical, still had legs late in summit finish
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: followed Aru's opportunistic counterattack and had speed to win but made mature call to sit up after securing gap
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: launched GC attack then sprinted aggressively for bonus seconds when caught, maximizing every time gain opportunity from 44 seconds down
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: recognized Froome's pacing effort exhausted Sky's options and counterattacked immediately, nearly took stage before Bennett passed
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: burned as domestique to pace Thomas back from mechanical despite sitting 9 seconds back in fifth overall
rider_signals.BAGIOLI Nicola: neutral: dominated KOM points in breakaway across three consecutive days, establishing tactical pattern for jersey hunt
